name: EvoSculpt Venus – Pelvic Floor Strengthening Intimate Pad
shortDescription: The EvoSculpt Venus is a targeted pelvic floor strengthening device with 3 electrodes that maximizes the effectiveness of Kegel exercises. It improves vaginal muscle strength, helps treat incontinence, and enhances sexual pleasure – comfortably, fully clothed, and discreetly.
description:
The EvoSculpt Venus is an innovative, targeted pelvic floor strengthening device that provides strong, low-frequency stimulation across the entire pelvic floor area through 3 specially positioned electrodes.

The device maximizes the effectiveness of Kegel exercises: electrodes placed in the vaginal and pubic bone areas deliver alternating low and medium frequency stimulation, powerfully contracting and relaxing the pelvic floor muscles. Precise muscle stimulation improves vaginal contraction ability, enhances sexual sensitivity, and helps prevent incontinence.

The device is comfortable and discreet to use – no undressing is required, and the treatment can be performed quickly and easily. Its scientifically proven effectiveness is supported by a study published in a world-renowned SCIE journal.
metaTitle: EvoSculpt Venus Intimate Pad | Pelvic Floor Strengthening Kegel Trainer | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: EvoSculpt Venus: professional pelvic floor strengthener with 3 electrodes. Incontinence treatment, Kegel training, sexual pleasure enhancement. Discreet, comfortable.

videoDescription.headline: Why offer intimate muscle strengthening treatments?
paragraphs: Demand for pelvic floor strengthening and intimate rehabilitation is dynamically growing. More and more women are seeking professional solutions for incontinence, post-childbirth muscle weakness, or to enhance their sexual experience.

The EvoSculpt Venus is a discreet, comfortable, and effective solution that clients can use while fully clothed. This creates a low entry barrier for clients – they're more willing to commit to the treatment.
Intimate muscle strengthening is a segment with little competition and high demand. With the EvoSculpt Venus, you can offer a unique, sought-after service in your salon.

features.title: Targeted pelvic floor strengthening with 3 electrodes

The EvoSculpt Venus's 3 specially positioned electrodes provide optimal stimulation across the entire pelvic floor muscle area.

How the device works:

3 electrodes for targeted stimulation of pelvic floor and vaginal muscles
Strong, low-frequency stimulation across the entire pelvic floor area
Alternating low and medium frequency for optimal muscle training
Maximizes the effectiveness of Kegel exercises
Scientifically proven effectiveness (SCIE journal)

features.title: Wide range of applications
features.description:
The EvoSculpt Venus is not just a Kegel trainer – it's a comprehensive pelvic floor strengthening solution that delivers results in multiple areas.
Incontinence treatment – preventing and reducing urinary leakage
Post-childbirth rehabilitation – restoring pelvic floor muscles
Sexual pleasure enhancement – vaginal muscle strengthening, increased sensitivity
Menopausal symptom relief – improving muscle tone during menopause
Preventive use – preventing pelvic floor weakness
discreet useno undressing neededscientifically proven

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the EvoSculpt Venus device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to acquire comprehensive knowledge for the professional and safe delivery of pelvic floor strengthening treatments.
items: Pelvic floor anatomy and principles of Kegel exercises
Correct positioning of the EvoSculpt Venus's 3 electrodes
Treatment protocols: incontinence, post-childbirth rehabilitation, muscle strengthening
Using the app: training diary, assessment, modes
closingParagraphs: During the training, we place special emphasis on client communication, which is of paramount importance for intimate treatments.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the EvoSculpt Venus device.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Kiss Bernadett
testimonials.text: With the EvoSculpt Venus, I've reached a completely <mark>new client base – women who were looking for post-childbirth pelvic floor rehabilitation</mark>. The discreet treatment is the biggest advantage: the client doesn't need to undress, which provides great comfort. It's a unique service in our area.

testimonials.name: Varga Adrienn
testimonials.text: We introduced it as a complementary service alongside body sculpting treatments, and <mark>the interest was surprisingly high</mark>. Incontinence is much more common than we'd think – clients are grateful to finally have somewhere to turn.

expertQuote.quote: Pelvic floor strengthening is an underserved but high-demand area. The EvoSculpt Venus's discreet, comfortable solution creates a low entry barrier for clients and provides a unique position for the salon.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: How does the EvoSculpt Venus work?
faq.answer: The device delivers strong, low-frequency stimulation to the pelvic floor muscles through 3 specially positioned electrodes. Alternating low and medium frequencies contract and relax the muscles, maximizing the effectiveness of Kegel exercises.

faq.question: Do I need to undress for the treatment?
faq.answer: No! One of the EvoSculpt Venus's biggest advantages is that the treatment can be performed fully clothed. This means discretion, comfort, and a low entry barrier for clients.

faq.question: Who is the treatment recommended for?
faq.answer: Primarily recommended for women seeking post-childbirth pelvic floor rehabilitation, incontinence treatment, sexual pleasure enhancement, or preventive pelvic floor muscle strengthening. It's also an excellent solution for women going through menopause.

faq.question: How often should it be used?
faq.answer: Regular use is recommended for optimal results. The app's training diary helps create a personalized treatment plan and track progress.

faq.question: Is the device safe?
faq.answer: Yes, the EvoSculpt Venus is completely safe, hygienic, and made from medical-grade materials (ABS, silicone, STS 304 electrodes). Its effectiveness is confirmed by a scientific study published in a world-renowned SCIE journal.

faq.question: Can I use it alongside the HIEMT body sculpting device?
faq.answer: Of course! The EvoSculpt Venus is an excellent complement to the EvoSculpt Smart and Smart 4 body sculpting devices. Offered alongside body sculpting, you can create a comprehensive service package covering both full body and pelvic floor treatments.

faq.question: How does it differ from a salon HIEMT chair?
faq.answer: The EvoSculpt Venus is a compact, portable device that can even be recommended for home use by clients. It can be introduced at a lower price point and in less space than large salon chairs, while providing targeted 3-electrode stimulation.
